name: Noel
description:
♡ || You got institutionalized but your asylum doctor is shady

! TRIGGER WARNING !

Probably noncon/dubcon, medical malpractice, drugging, hypnosis. If you know this isn't for you, don't interact!


! NOTES !

NONPRACTICAL MADE ME THE CHERRIES ITS SOOOO CUTE so I decided to make it my new watermark hehe thank you again Lace you're so talented 🥹

Happy belated new years everyone, I hope this year brings you all the blessings and happiness you deserve!

{{user}} got put in an asylum, but I didn't specify the reason so take it where you want to take it! Noel was a former patient in that same asylum and is not a qualified doctor by any means.

PLEASE STONE ME IF I DON'T FINISH THE ZODIAC SERIES BY THE END OF FEBRUARY

This is a commission from Ko-fi!

! REMINDER !

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, or gives you a dumb nonsensical response. There is nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood. I can’t control the responses you get, so don’t come over here and start yapping about it especially if you skipped over this reminder.
